subject: fix(ui): cap filter button width so long labels don't crowd the search
body:
Filter buttons (fuel type, radius) had no maxWidth — long labels like
"Diesel 500ppm" or "Illuminating Paraffin" could push the search button
off screen. Added maxWidth: 100 on the button itself and flexShrink: 0
so they stay compact and fixed. Search keeps flex: 1 to fill remaining space.

Tags: ui, layout, header, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
